name: @ai-native-solutions/falllink-sdk
description: Reusable WebRTC P2P library. STUN + BroadcastChannel same-origin auto-discovery + manual offer/answer paste for cross-network. One connection layer every tool imports.
author: AI-Native Solutions <sjgant80@gmail.com>

scripts.test: node -e "import('./src/index.js').then(m => { if (!m.FallLink) throw new Error('FallLink export missing'); console.log('ok · FallLink exported'); })"
